node.name: DDRC
node.title: DDR controller AHB2 group
node.desc: note: incomplete, only lists registers used by DDR init code

node.name: DDRC_APB
node.title: DDR controller APB group
node.desc: note: incomplete, only lists registers used by DDR init code

node.name: DDRPHY
node.title: DDR PHY group
node.desc: note: incomplete, only lists registers used by DDR init code

node.name: C_GLITCH
node.desc: GPIO port C: glitch filter registers

node.name: Z_GID2LD
node.desc: GPIO port Z: atomic load register
